mapper.insert: insert into setmeal (category_id, name, price, description, image, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) values (#{categoryId}, #{name}, #{price}, #{description}, #{image}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser})
mapper.update:
update setmeal
name = #{name},
category_id = #{categoryId},
price = #{price},
status = #{status},
description = #{description},
image = #{image},
update_time = #{updateTime},
update_user = #{updateUser},
where id = #{id}
update setmeal set status=#{status} where id=#{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from setmeal where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
select setmeal_id from setmeal_dish where dish_id in
#{id}
select status from setmeal where id=#{id}
select s.* from setmeal as s left join setmeal_dish as sd on s.id=sd.setmeal_id where sd.dish_id=#{id}
